name: Cossacks Motorcycle Club
description: American outlaw motorcycle club founded in Tyler, Texas in 1969 by six bikers. One of the largest outlaw biker groups in Texas, known for conflicts with the Bandidos Motorcycle Club, including the 2015 Waco shootout. Has chapters in Texas, Ohio, Indiana, and Virginia.

sources.title: Bandidos MC criminal allegations and incidents — Wikipedia
